title: Bitcoin slips below $66,000, U.S. stock futures bleed as Iran hits Saudi oil refinery
description: Iran has reportedly stepped up attacks against U.S. assets in the middle east.

title: Riot Platforms, Core Scientific earnings, U.S. jobs report: Crypto Week Ahead
description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting March 2.

title: Hong Kong links up with Shanghai trade authorities to put cargo data on blockchain
description: HKMA teams up with mainland regulators to develop a cross-border platform linking cargo data and electronic bills of lading, aiming to cut trade finance friction and plug Chinese supply chains into global markets

title: U.S. equity futures fall in pre-market trading as oil, gold retreat from highs
description: Oil and gold pulled back after surging on the breakout of hostilities in Iran, while equities and crypto stocks face pressure.

title: Bitcoin outperforms equities in risk-off session as Iran conflict enters third day
description: Bitcoin rebounded to $66,500 after weekend strikes on Iran triggered $300 million in liquidations. Oil jumped, equities slid and select DeFi tokens outperformed.

title: Battered bitcoin could find solace in war-led 'debasement' trade
description: Your day-ahead look for March 2, 2026

title: Anthony Pompliano’s ProCap Financial buys 450 bitcoin, steps up share buybacks
description: The acquisition makes ProCap the 19th largest publicly traded holder of bitcoin, while lowering the company’s average cost basis per coin.

title: South Korea investigates seed phrase leak in photo leading to $4.8 million crypto theft from tax authority
description: The National Tax Service said it had intended to provide a vivid shot of the seizure by sharing a photo.

title: Strategy purchased more than $200 million in bitcoin last week
description: The latest purchase, funded through common and preferred stock sales, lifted total holdings to 720,737 coins valued at more than $47 billion.

title: Turkey's ruling party unveils 10% crypto income tax proposal
description: The bill proposes a 10% tax on gains from regulated crypto platforms, withheld quarterly, with the president having the power to adjust the rate between 0% and 20%.

title: Iranian crypto outflows jump 700% minutes after U.S.-Israeli airstrikes, Elliptic says
description: The blockchain analytics firm said flows from Iran’s largest exchange spiked immediately after U.S.-Israeli strikes on Tehran, pointing to possible capital flight.

title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) jumps 12.4% over weekend
description: Solana (SOL), up 2.1% from Friday, was also among the top performers.

title: EU banks’ euro-pegged stablecoin in talks with crypto exchanges to ensure liquidity
description: Qivalis is a group of 12 major EU banks developing a euro-pegged stablecoin they plan to debut in the second half of the year.

title: Tom Lee's Bitmine boosts ether holdings to 4.47 million tokens with  $98 million ETH purchase
description: The ether treasury firm now has nearly $10 billion in assets and more than $6 billion of ETH staked.

title: Bitcoin surges above $68,000 amid muted stock market reaction to Iran war
description: At their worst levels, U.S. stock index futures had been down more than 2%, but equity markets are barely lower one hour into Monday's trading session.

title: Nasdaq follows Cboe joining world of 'binary bets' as prediction market craze hits Wall Street
description: The exchange has filed a proposal with the SEC to list yes-or-no bets on the Nasdaq-100 amid continued demand for prediction markets.

title: Crypto world faces growing pressure to relent on stablecoin rewards to win bigger prize
description: As much as crypto negotiators paint bank lobbyists' campaign against stablecoin yield as unfair, it landed a blow that one dramatic move could end.

title: Weekend warriors: How HyperLiquid became retail’s bear market playground
description: While bitcoin and ether remain in bear markets, HYPE has climbed alongside gold as HyperLiquid’s derivatives volume expands, weekend equity trading gains traction.

title: Battle for Bitcoin's soul opens as first block supporting 'clean-up' proposal is mined
description: A Bitcoin block signaling the BIP-110 proposal has appeared onchain while critics push back by inscribing a large image in protest.

title: Vitalik Buterin unveils plan to curb Ethereum block builder centralization
description: Another focus of his post is so-called “toxic MEV,” where traders exploit visibility into pending transactions to front-run or “sandwich” users’ trades.

title: Bitcoin’s 5% spike higher Monday driven by short-covering, not fresh buying, says analyst
description: Market data show rising open interest and large liquidation clusters around $65,000 and above $70,000, underscoring that the rally may be fragile without stronger spot demand

title: Australia could unlock A$24 billion in digital finance gains, is on track for just A$1 billion
